contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Strategy backtester (/compare repurpose) — endpoint + JS engine + sell-off overlay
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1058
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1060
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1061
  
  Details:
  Designed and shipped a strategy backtester by repurposing Edgar's `/compare` view
  (TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer). Paired session: Claude (Opus) with Gary.
  
  **What changed**
  - New read-only `GET /backtest/data` endpoint: real trading bars (no forward-fill),
    risk-free series from `daily_yield_curves.month_3`, default `LARGE_DIP_INDEX` benchmark.
  - Client-side JS strategy engine (`backtest_engine.js`): buy-and-hold vs rebalance-band
    on a constant-capital cash sleeve; metrics = total / CAGR / Sharpe / vol / maxDD /
    trades / turnover.
  - Backtester page `/backtest/:tickers/:from/:to`: controls, equity-curve chart, metrics
    table, shareable URL.
  - Sell-off index overlay: when `LARGE_DIP_INDEX` is pulled in, the chart draws the same
    over/under-correction Bollinger guides as the homepage (reusing `MacroIndicator`), so
    entry timing is visible against the backtest.
  - Three design/roadmap docs committed (data-endpoint contract, JS engine spec, execution
    roadmap with resume tracker).
  
  **Why**
  A decision tool for position management (e.g. hold vs band-rebalance on a name like PLAY),
  with honest apples-to-apples comparison (cash sleeve) and the operator's correction-level
  entry signal overlaid.
  
  **Notable**: deliberately built NO split/anomaly detector — the rendered chart is the
  detector (the human is already in the loop). Verified via node engine test, rspec
  (5 green), and a worktree server curl against prod data.
  
  **Pull requests**
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1058 (specs + roadmap)
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1060 (data endpoint)
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1061 (UI + engine + sell-off overlay)
  
  Time basis (~90 min): design discussion + 3 spec docs + roadmap, then endpoint, branch
  recovery from a parallel session, full UI/engine build, verification, and cleanup.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
